meta_description: Verify your DaNangTrip account using the email link or an OTP code.

verifying.title: Verifying your email...
verifying.subtitle: Please wait a moment while we process your request.

otp.title: Verify your email
otp.subtitle: We have sent a verification code to:
otp.description: Please enter the 6-digit OTP code to activate your account.

success.title: Email verified successfully!
success.subtitle: Your account has been successfully activated.

failure.title: Verification Failed
failure.token_expired: The verification code has expired or is invalid. Please request a new email.
failure.token_invalid: The verification token is incorrect or has already been used.
failure.otp_invalid: The OTP code is incorrect. Please try again.
failure.otp_attempts_left: Incorrect OTP code. You have {count} attempts left.
failure.general_error: An error occurred during verification. Please try again later.

already_verified.title: Email already verified
already_verified.subtitle: Your account is already active. You can now use all our services.
